urdu transliteration text:
YA  RAQIBAN  NAHWAL  MADINATI
QASIDA.
ALL TOGETHER:
“ASSALAAMU ALAYK”
english translation text:
O  TRAVELLER  PROCEEDING TOWARDS MADINA...
(PEACE BE UPON YOU)

urdu transliteration text:
BALIGH  SALAAMI  LI  NABIYI  MUHAMMADIN.
ALL TOGETHER:
“ASSALAAMU ALAYK”
english translation text:
GIVE MY RESPECTS  TO THE PROPHET MUHAMMAD...
(PEACE BE UPON YOU)

urdu transliteration text:
WA  QULI  SALAAMU  ALAYKA YA ALAMAL  HUDA.
ALL TOGETHER:
“ASSALAAMU ALAYK”
english translation text:
AND SAY PEACE BE UPON YOU, O THE FLAG OF THE FLAG OF GUIDANCE...
(PEACE BE UPON YOU)

urdu transliteration text:
ANTA  DALILU 'ALAA  RASHAADIL AWHADI.
ALL TOGETHER:
“ASSALAAMU ALAYK”
english translation text:
AND  YOU  ARE  THE EVIDENCE FOR  GUIDANCE OF TAWHEED...
(PEACE BE UPON YOU)

urdu transliteration text:
ANTA-LLADHI  WARATHA  NUBUWATAWAL  HUDA.
ALL TOGETHER:
“ASSALAAMU ALAYK”
english translation text:
AND  YOU  ARE  THE  INHERITOR OF PROPHETHOOD AND  GUIDANCE...
(PEACE BE UPON YOU)

urdu transliteration text:
ANTA-DALILU  LIKULLI  ABDIN MURSHIDIN.
ALL TOGETHER:
“ASSALAAMU ALAYK”
english translation text:
YOU ARE THE GUIDE  TO ALL THE GUIDED SERVANTS...
(PEACE BE UPON YOU)

urdu transliteration text:
WATARANNAMAL WARAQUL- HAMAMU SHUHADA
ALL TOGETHER:
“ASSALAAMU ALAYK”
english translation text:
THE PIGEON HUMBLED AND WHISPERED AS A WITNESS...
(PEACE BE UPON YOU)

urdu transliteration text:
SWALLA  ALAYKALLAH-AKRAMAL MURSALIN.
ALL TOGETHER:
“ASSALAAMU ALAYK”
english translation text:
GRETINNGS OF ALLAH BE UPON YOU THE NOBLE AMONG  MESSENGERS...
(PEACE BE UPON YOU)

urdu transliteration text: YA AHMAD, YA MUHAMMAD, YA ABAL QASIM, YA ABA ZAHRA, JADIL HASSANAIN, MAN BI ABI SALAMI, SHUFFAU FIL QIYAMI, MUDHALLALI BIL INAMI YA BADRU TAMAMI, ZAMZAM WAL MUQAMI, HAIDAR YA IMAMI, WA ALAYKAS SALAAM.
english translation text: OH AHMAD, OH MUHAMMAD, OH FATHER OF QASIM,  OH FATHER OF ZAHRA, GRANDFATHER OF HASSANAIN, PEACE BE UPON YOU, WHO I AM WILLING TO SACRIFICE MY LIFE FOR, WHO PROVIDES FORGIVENESS IN THE HEREAFTER , IMAM ALI WHO IS LIKE THE FULL MOON IN THE HEAVENS SURROUNDED BY ALL OF MANKIND, ZAM ZAM AND THE SHRINE, HAIDER MY LEADER, MY GREETINGS UPON YOU...
